name: Heading level shortcuts
description: Set or clear the focused block's heading level with remappable commands and shortcuts.
author: Sol for Tine

commands.title: Heading: clear level
commands.description: Remove the focused block's heading level.

commands.title: Heading: level 1
commands.description: Set the focused block to heading level 1.

commands.title: Heading: level 2
commands.description: Set the focused block to heading level 2.

commands.title: Heading: level 3
commands.description: Set the focused block to heading level 3.

commands.title: Heading: level 4
commands.description: Set the focused block to heading level 4.

commands.title: Heading: level 5
commands.description: Set the focused block to heading level 5.

commands.title: Heading: level 6
commands.description: Set the focused block to heading level 6.
